name: Eagle's Landing Indoor Golf
about: Eagles Landing Indoor Golf is an indoor golf facility located in Demopolis, Alabama, featuring three state-of-the-art simulator bays. The venue utilizes an AI-powered overhead launch monitor with dual high-speed cameras to provide precise tracking of both club and ball data, offering detailed analytics for short game and putting. Pricing is described as competitive, with options for hourly rates and annual memberships, and the facility also includes a bar with a modest selection of food and snacks. The venue is designed for golfers to improve their game, play on hundreds of virtual courses, or enjoy a social experience with friends and family.
why_golfers_like_it: AI-powered overhead launch monitor provides precise club and ball tracking analytics
Large hitting zone allows for a more comfortable and natural playing experience
Opportunity to play 18 holes on hundreds of virtual courses with friends
Detailed video playback of swings helps with game improvement
Competitive pricing and membership options available

food_and_drink.notes: Offers a modest selection of food and snacks
On-site bar available with an alcohol selection
